text.title: idea-generation-methods Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for idea-generation-methods as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: LLMs default to "AI scheduler", "task tracker", "AI for X" outputs under default temperature settings.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Training data for solopreneur ideation is dominated by these patterns. Without explicit diversity forcing, agents repeat them across every framework and every session.

failure-mode.description: Agents conflate "passion" ideas with "profession" ideas, producing near-duplicate candidates across two P categories.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without a strict definition prompt-side, the model treats passion and profession as semantically overlapping domains.

failure-mode.description: PG question 3 ("what do you find yourself building for yourself") produces Dropbox/Notion clones without founder-specific personal context.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The model defaults to well-known successful answers from training data when personal context is absent.
